chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-173 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For orders on CMA No.6076/2023 3. For hearing of CMA No.6077/2023 4. For hearing of CMA No.5963/2023 5. For hearing of CMA No.790/2023 6. For hearing of main case 21-12-2023 Mr. Nisar Ahmed Bhanbhro, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General a/w Safdar li Kalwar Mukhtiarkar Sukkur City and Fayaz Ahmed Mangi Secretary, District Regional Transport Authority, Sukkur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- In compliance of last order Assistant Commissioner Sukkur City has submitted a report of her visit to New Bus Terminal Rohri, and has claimed that the same Bus stop is functional. The report is taken on record. The grievance of the petitioner is that on Baberloi bypass and City Point bypass the buses stop while on their way to New Bus Terminal Rohri for pick and drop of passengers which causes traffic jam. Mukhtiarkar Sukkur City and Secretary District Regional Transport Authority undertake that they would make sure that a proper shoulder on the road near on the same points facilitating the buses to pick and drop passengers for the city would be made functional. The buses would not be allowed to stand there for any length of time as the same causes traffic jam. Counsel for the petitioner is satisfied and this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
